title: Extended: subject (v0.1)
description: Audience-neutral identification of the Pack's subject — what is being attested about. Carried under the Pack envelope's 'extended.subject' field.

subjectId.description: Stable identifier for the subject. When the subject is an agent registered in the project, this SHOULD equal the agentId of the corresponding project.agent.registered event. For higher-level subjects (deployments, systems, projects) implementer-defined URIs are used.

subjectType.description: Kind of subject. Canonical values: 'agent', 'system', 'deployment', 'project'. Enumeration is OPEN — implementers MAY use other values, and validators MUST NOT reject solely on unknown values (per ADR 0005).

name.description: Human-readable display name for the subject.

version.description: Version identifier for the subject at the time of attestation. Free-form string. Distinct from any agent/tool versioning recorded in project.*.registered events.
